name: python3-ply
title: python3-ply
summary: Lex and Yacc implementation for Python3
description:
Lex and Yacc implementation for Python3
PLY   is   yet  another   implementation   of   lex   and  yacc   for
Python.  Although  several  other  parsing tools  are  available  for
Python, there are  several reasons why you might want  to take a look
at PLY:
* It's implemented entirely in Python.
* It uses  LR-parsing which is reasonably efficient  and well suited
for larger grammars.
* PLY  provides most  of  the standard  lex/yacc features  including
support for  empty productions, precedence  rules, error recovery,
and support for ambiguous grammars.
* PLY is  extremely easy  to use and  provides very  extensive error
checking.
.
This package contains the Python 3 module.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use dh_python3-ply because Lex and Yacc implementation for Python3.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use dh_python3-ply as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `dh_python3-ply [--dependency-field dependencyfield] [debhelper options] file...` as documented upstream for dh_python3-ply.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair dh_python3-ply with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `dh_python3-ply --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
